narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: for the west it’s always been the soviet (RUSSIAN) that has ALWAYS been the boogie man..when in fact they were SELDOM a threat.. amerika always blew any comment about RUSSIA or at later stages CHINA way out of proportion.. and you are still doing
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: This quote directly criticizes Western (specifically American) foreign policy and perception, accusing it of unjustly portraying Russia as a constant threat and exaggerating its actions, which aligns with discrediting Western diplomatic stance and motives.

narrative_votes_with_evidence.narrative_name: URW: Negative Consequences for the West
narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: thanks mostly to un-elected bureaucrats in all “western countries” they are proving the worst of the worst of humanity
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: The statement blames unelected Western bureaucrats for leading humanity towards ruin, highlighting a negative outcome (societal collapse) attributed to Western governance structures.

narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: Sadly the western media is framing the war as if Russia is losing which only prolongs negotiations and causes more death.
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: This quote explicitly questions the reliability and motives of Western media, accusing it of misrepresenting the war's progress (framing Russia as losing) with harmful consequences, fitting the narrative of media distrust.

narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: lets get on with a full nuke war…wipe us all out …at least it (for most) will be over quickly
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: This statement evokes fear and anxiety about the potential for nuclear war, presenting it as an almost desirable outcome due to despair, which amplifies fears about extreme conflict escalation.

narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: Russia is Winning, Nuclear Threat is a Sign of Desperation & Very Serious
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: The title of the post and the core premise speculates on the outcome of the war (Russia winning) and the potential consequence of nuclear escalation, which fits the narrative of predicting conflict results.

narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: for the west it’s always been the soviet (RUSSIAN) that has ALWAYS been the boogie man..when in fact they were SELDOM a threat.. amerika always blew any comment about RUSSIA or at later stages CHINA way out of proportion..
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: This quote portrays Russia (and the Soviet Union) as being unfairly and consistently demonized ('boogie man') by the West, despite being 'SELDOM a threat'. This frames Russia as a victim of Western exaggeration and targeting, aligning with the narrative of Russia being unfairly portrayed or victimized.

narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: amerikans are the greatest pigs on the planet…and that is in the most derogitive term you can imagine.. absolute pigs
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: This is a direct, severe, and derogatory criticism of Americans, representing a broad attack on the character of the Western populace. It discredits the West by dehumanizing its people, fitting the narrative of criticizing Western countries and their societies.
